seoTitle: Lockwood South vs Logan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lockwood South and Logan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lockwood South vs Logan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lockwood South and Logan.
heading: Lockwood South vs Logan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lockwood South, Victoria and Logan, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lockwood South has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Logan (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lockwood South or Logan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lockwood South has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Logan scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lockwood South scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Logan scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lockwood South or Logan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lockwood South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
